cases.title: All vertex shaders declare uHasSizeAttr uniform
cases.description: Each of the four vertex shaders (pointWarp, particleWarp, ribbonWarp, crystalWarp) must declare 'uniform float uHasSizeAttr'
cases.acceptance_criteria: Shader supports a valid default point-size path without optional custom size attributes

cases.title: All vertex shaders use mix() fallback for point size instead of raw size attribute
cases.description: Each vertex shader must compute sizeMultiplier via mix(1.0, size, uHasSizeAttr) and use sizeMultiplier in the pointSize calculation instead of raw 'size'
cases.acceptance_criteria: Shader supports a valid default point-size path without optional custom size attributes

cases.title: uHasSizeAttr defaults to 0.0 in COMMON_UNIFORMS
cases.description: The shader registry COMMON_UNIFORMS array must include uHasSizeAttr with type 'float' and defaultValue 0.0
cases.acceptance_criteria: Scene renders with a uniform base point size when per-point size data is unavailable

cases.title: Required attribute arrays no longer include size
cases.description: POINTCLOUD_ATTRIBUTES, PARTICLEFIELD_ATTRIBUTES, and RIBBONFIELD_ATTRIBUTES must not contain an entry with name 'size'
cases.acceptance_criteria: Optional size modulation can be enabled only when corresponding attributes are present

cases.title: Optional attribute arrays contain size with itemSize 1
cases.description: New exported arrays OPTIONAL_POINTCLOUD_ATTRIBUTES, OPTIONAL_PARTICLEFIELD_ATTRIBUTES, and OPTIONAL_RIBBONFIELD_ATTRIBUTES must each contain { name: 'size', itemSize: 1 }
cases.acceptance_criteria: Optional size modulation can be enabled only when corresponding attributes are present

cases.title: Geometry validator passes when optional size attribute is absent
cases.description: validateGeometryAttributes called with required-only attributes (no size) on geometry without size attribute must return ok: true
cases.acceptance_criteria: Missing optional size attributes do not break shader compilation

cases.title: Geometry validator validates present optional attributes correctly
cases.description: When optional size attribute IS present, validateGeometryAttributes must validate its itemSize and finite values. Wrong itemSize or NaN values should produce errors.
cases.acceptance_criteria: Optional size modulation can be enabled only when corresponding attributes are present

cases.title: Geometry validator catches NaN in optional size attribute when present
cases.description: If the optional size attribute exists but contains NaN, the validator should report an error for that attribute
cases.acceptance_criteria: Missing optional size attributes do not break shader compilation

cases.title: Geometry validator catches wrong itemSize on optional size attribute when present
cases.description: If the optional size attribute exists but has wrong itemSize (e.g. 3 instead of 1), the validator should report an itemSize error
cases.acceptance_criteria: Optional size modulation can be enabled only when corresponding attributes are present

cases.title: mix(1.0, size, 0.0) yields safe baseline of 1.0
cases.description: Verify mathematically that the GLSL mix(1.0, size, 0.0) pattern yields 1.0 regardless of size value, confirming the safe fallback
cases.acceptance_criteria: Scene renders with a uniform base point size when per-point size data is unavailable

cases.title: mix(1.0, size, 1.0) yields per-vertex size when enabled
cases.description: Verify mathematically that mix(1.0, size, 1.0) yields the size value, confirming per-vertex modulation works when uHasSizeAttr = 1.0
cases.acceptance_criteria: Optional size modulation can be enabled only when corresponding attributes are present

cases.title: All GLSL uniforms including uHasSizeAttr are registered in COMMON_UNIFORMS
cases.description: Parse each vertex shader for uniform declarations and verify every uniform (including uHasSizeAttr) exists in COMMON_UNIFORMS with matching type
cases.acceptance_criteria: Missing optional size attributes do not break shader compilation

cases.title: No undeclared identifiers in shaders after adding uHasSizeAttr and sizeMultiplier
cases.description: After the shader changes, the T-049-04 identifier resolution test must still pass — sizeMultiplier must be a declared local and uHasSizeAttr must be a declared uniform
cases.acceptance_criteria: Missing optional size attributes do not break shader compilation
